regexCodeList.string: ^You carefully place a (.*) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card within the (.*)?Case\.$
^You carefully retrieve a (.*) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card from the (.*)?Case\.$
^(.*) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card$

^Market: (.+ has (?:proxy )?bid [\d,]+ gold on|Bid of [\d,]+ gold on|.+ is selling) (.+) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card \(Level \d+, Num \d+\).?( Auction is for Gold\.)?$

^Auction: (.+ has placed a bid for [\d,]+ gold on|.+ is auctioning) (.+) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card \(Level \d+, Num \d+\).( Current bid is [\d,]+.)?$
^([\d ]+) - .+(.+) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card\s+\d+\s+.+$
^ (\d+) (.+) (Fantasy|Expansion|Memorial and Immortal's|Original and Immortal's) Series Collector's Card\s+\d+ (\*| )?G.+$

Script.name: FantasyCardsCompatAliases
FantasyCardsScript
Script.script:
-- Fantasy Cards Mudlet script (initial) local fateTable = {} local scanInProgress = false
local function plain_from_colours(...) local args={...} if #args==1 then return tostring(args[1]) end local out={} local i=1 while i<=#args do if i+2<=#args then table.insert(out,tostring(args[i+2] or "")); i=i+3 else table.insert(out,tostring(args[i] or "")); i=i+1 end end return table.concat(out) end
local function ColourNote(...) cecho("<orange>[FantasyCards] "..plain_from_colours(...).."\n") end
local function ColourTell(...) echo(plain_from_colours(...)) end
local function Note(s) echo((s or "").."\n") end
local function Send(cmd) send(cmd) end local function SendNoEcho(cmd) send(cmd, false) end local function EnableTrigger(name, v) enableTrigger(name, v and 1 or 0) end local persist_save local function EnableTriggerGroup(name, v) if type(enableTriggerGroup)=="function" then enableTriggerGroup(name, v and 1 or 0) else EnableTrigger(name, v) end end local function GetVariable(name) if name == "fateTable" then return fateTable end return _G[name] end
local function SetVariable(name, value) if name == "fateTable" then fateTable = value persist_save() return end _G[name] = value end
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/fantasy_cards_state.lua"
local function persist_load() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local loaded = nil local ok, data = pcall(dofile, STATE_FILE) if ok and type(data) == "table" then loaded = data if type(loaded.fateTable) ~= "table" and type(loaded[1]) == "table" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end end if not loaded and type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, data2 = pcall(table.load, STATE_FILE) if ok2 and type(data2) == "table" then loaded = data2 end end end
if type(loaded) == "table" and type(loaded.fateTable) == "table" then fateTable = loaded.fateTable elseif type(loaded) == "table" and next(loaded) ~= nil then fateTable = loaded end
if next(fateTable)==nil then ResetTable() end end
persist_save = function() local payload = { fateTable = fateTable }
local function lua_serialize(value) local t = type(value) if t == "number" or t == "boolean" then return tostring(value) end if t == "string" then return string.format("%q", value) end if t == "table" then local out = {"{"} for k, v in pairs(value) do local key = (type(k) == "string" and k:match("^[%a_][%w_]*$")) and k or ("[" .. lua_serialize(k) .. "]") out[#out + 1] = key .. " = " .. lua_serialize(v) .. "," end out[#out + 1] = "}" return table.concat(out, " ") end return "nil" end
local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. lua_serialize(payload)) f:close() end end
function ResetTable() fateTable = { ["alessandrew"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["alhena"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["androg"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["ani"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["bejito"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["blurp"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["bonjour"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["cadaver"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["cartman"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["chuft"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["cordelia"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["craven"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["curi"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["dagonet"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["dave"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["demonspawn"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["dereliction"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["dexter"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["djvoltron"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["domain"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["evie"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["fatesdagger"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["galinthas"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["gren"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["hank"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["hiroki"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["jennie"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["leaf"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["linoge"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["lumina"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["madcatz"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy = "Fantasy Series" }, ["oladon"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["original"] = { count = 0, caseID = 1, caseName = "Fantasy Series" }, ["quadrapus"] = { count = 0, caseID = "Memorial and Immortal's Series" }, ["althalus"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["anaristos"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["baejita"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["banichi"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["broud"] = { ["dreamfyre"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["elisa"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["entreri"] = { count = 0, }, ["maerchyng"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["marcon"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["mashai"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["methdemon"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["moons"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["obyron"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["orcwarrior"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["paramore"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["penthesilea"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["pointless"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["pudge"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["rhuli"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["rumour"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["sagen"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["sirene"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["skarren"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["styliann"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["sunset"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["sylvain"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["tela"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["tenchi"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["teoyaomqui"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["testasterone"]= { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["timeghost"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["valkur"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["velvet"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["vesuvius"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["vilgan"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["vitae"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["xeno"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" }, ["yandros"] = { count = 0, caseID = 4, caseName = "Original and Immortal's Series" } } end
function Help() ColourNote("orange", "", "Fantasy Cards commands: lft help | lft search/find <card> | lft summary <1-4> | lft report <1-4> <channel> | lft owned <1-4> <channel> | lft scan") end
function OnPluginInstall() persist_load() Help() end
function FindCardStatus(cardName) local card = string.lower(trim(cardName)) if fateTable[card] ~= nil then if fateTable[card].count == 0 then return "NEED" else return "HAVE" end end return "UNK" end
-- Trim whitespace from string function trim(str) return (str:gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")) end
-- Market trigger handler function MarketCard(name, line, wildcards, styles) local cardName = wildcards.card local status = FindCardStatus(cardName) local w = 0 for i, s in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(s.textcolour), "", s.text) -- Find position after "Series Collector's Card" to insert status if string.find(s.text, "Series Collector's Card") then w = i end if i == w and status == "NEED" then ColourTell("magenta", "", " [", "cyan", "", status, "magenta", "", "]") w = 0 end end Note("") end
-- Auction trigger handler function AuctionCard(name, line, wildcards, styles) local cardName = wildcards.card local status = FindCardStatus(cardName) local w = 0 for i, s in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(s.textcolour), "", s.text) if string.find(s.text, "Series Collector's Card") then w = i end if i == w and status == "NEED" then ColourTell("magenta", "", " [", "cyan", "", status, "magenta", "", "]") w = 0 end end Note("") end
-- Bid list trigger handler function BidCard(name, line, wildcards, styles) local cardName = trim(wildcards.card) local status = FindCardStatus(cardName) for i, s in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(s.textcolour), "", s.text) end if status == "NEED" then ColourNote("magenta", "", " [", "cyan", "", status, "magenta", "", "]") else Note("") end end
-- LBid list trigger handler function LBidCard(name, line, wildcards, styles) local cardName = trim(wildcards.card) local status = FindCardStatus(cardName) for i, s in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(s.textcolour), "", s.text) end if status == "NEED" then ColourNote("magenta", "", " [", "cyan", "", status, "magenta", "", "]") else Note("") end end
-- Market list trigger handler (for truncated names in market list) function MarketListCard(name, line, wildcards, styles) local cardName = trim(wildcards.card) local status = FindCardStatus(cardName) for i, s in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(s.textcolour), "", s.text) end if status == "NEED" then ColourNote("magenta", "", " [", "cyan", "", status, "magenta", "", "]") else Note("") end end
-- Scan all 4 collector cases function ScanCases() ColourNote("yellow", "", "Scanning all 4 collector cases...") ResetTable() scanInProgress = true casesScanned = 0 EnableTrigger("scan_done", true) Send("identify collector1") Send("identify collector2") Send("identify collector3") Send("identify collector4") SendNoEcho("echo @YScanned all Fantasy Card cases!") end
-- Scan completion handler function ScanComplete() EnableTrigger("scan_done", false) persist_save() scanInProgress = false
-- Count owned cards per case local owned = {0, 0, 0, 0} local total = {0, 0, 0, 0} for key, value in pairs(fateTable) do total[value.caseID] = total[value.caseID] + 1 if value.count == 1 then owned[value.caseID] = owned[value.caseID] + 1 end end
ColourNote("green", "", "Scan complete!") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Case 1 (Fantasy): " .. owned[1] .. "/" .. total[1] .. " cards") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Case 2 (Expansion): " .. owned[2] .. "/" .. total[2] .. " cards") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Case 3 (Memorial/Immortal): " .. owned[3] .. "/" .. total[3] .. " cards") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Case 4 (Original/Immortal): " .. owned[4] .. "/" .. total[4] .. " cards") end
function ReportCards(name, line, wildcards) local caseID = tonumber(wildcards.case) local caseName = "" local iCount = 0 local sText = "" if caseID < 1 or caseID > 4 then ColourNote("orange", "", "Invalid case range. Case must be 1, 2, 3 or 4.") return end
for key, value in pairsByKeys(fateTable) do if value.caseID == caseID then --Proper case if caseName == "" then caseName = value.caseName end
if tonumber(value.count) == 0 then --Don't have this card. iCount = iCount + 1 if iCount == 1 then --First card, no need to add sText = sText .. CapFirst(key) else sText = sText .. "@c,@W " .. CapFirst(key) end end end end
if tonumber(iCount) == 0 then sText = sText .. "No cards remaining." end
Send(wildcards.channel .. " @C[@M" .. caseName .. "@C] @cCards left: @W" .. iCount .. "@c. Cards: @W" .. sText) end
function ReportOwnedCards(name, line, wildcards) local caseID = tonumber(wildcards.case) local caseName = "" local iCount = 0 local sText = "" if caseID < 1 or caseID > 4 then ColourNote("orange", "", "Invalid case range. Case must be 1, 2, 3 or 4.") return end
for key, value in pairsByKeys(fateTable) do if value.caseID == caseID then --Proper case if caseName == "" then caseName = value.caseName end
if tonumber(value.count) == 1 then --Have this card. iCount = iCount + 1 if iCount == 1 then --First card, no need to add sText = sText .. CapFirst(key) else sText = sText .. "@c,@W " .. CapFirst(key) end end end end
if tonumber(iCount) == 0 then sText = sText .. "No cards owned." end
Send(wildcards.channel .. " @C[@M" .. caseName .. "@C] @cCards owned: @W" .. tonumber(iCount) .. "@c. Cards: @W" .. sText) end
function Summary(name, line, wildcards) local caseID = tonumber(wildcards.case) local caseName = "" local iCount = 0 local iCount2 = 0 local sText = ""
if caseID < 1 or caseID > 4 then ColourNote("orange", "", "Invalid case range. Case must be 1, 2, 3 or 4.") return end
for key, value in pairs(fateTable) do if value.caseID == caseID then if caseName == "" then caseName = value.caseName end
if value.count == 1 then iCount = iCount + 1 else iCount2 = iCount2 + 1 end end end ColourNote("orange", "", "Displaying your summary of Fate cards for case: ", "cyan", "", caseName) ColourNote("orange", "", "\n\rCards owned: ", "cyan", "", iCount, "orange", "", " Cards needed: ", "cyan", "", iCount2)
iCount = 0 local tCount = 0 ColourNote("orange", "", "\n\rYou need the following cards:") for key, value in pairsByKeys(fateTable) do if value.caseID == caseID then --Proper case if tonumber(value.count) == 0 then --Don't have this card. iCount = iCount + 1 tCount = tCount + 1 if iCount == 1 then --No tab in front sText = sText .. string.format("%2i) %-15s", tCount, CapFirst(key)) elseif iCount >= 4 then --Done, send and start fresh sText = sText .. "\t" .. string.format("%2i) %-15s", tCount, CapFirst(key)) ColourNote("cyan", "", sText) iCount = 0 sText = "" else --Add tab in front sText = sText .. "\t" .. string.format("%2i) %-15s", tCount, CapFirst(key)) end end end end if iCount > 0 then --Leftover text, send it ColourNote("cyan", "", sText) end end
function FindCard(name, line, wildcards) local sText = string.lower(wildcards[2])
if fateTable[sText] == nil then ColourNote("orange", "", "The card \'" .. sText .. "\' does not exist in any sets.") else if fateTable[sText].count == 0 then ColourNote("orange", "", "You do ", "red", "", "NOT", "orange", "", " have the ", "cyan", "", CapFirst(sText), "orange", "", "[", "magenta", "", fateTable[sText].caseName, "orange", "", "] card.") else ColourNote("orange", "", "You ", "lime", "", "DO", "orange", "", " have the ", "cyan", "", CapFirst(sText), "orange", "", "[", "magenta", "", fateTable[sText].caseName, "orange", "", "] card.") end end end
function StartCapture(name, line, wildcards) -- Only reset table if not in a scan (scan already reset it) if not scanInProgress then ResetTable() end EnableTriggerGroup("fate_capture", true) end
function Capture(name, line, wildcards) local cardName = string.lower(wildcards.card) if fateTable[cardName] ~= nil then fateTable[cardName].count = 1 end end
function RetrieveCard(name, line, wildcards) local cardName = string.lower(wildcards.card) if fateTable[cardName] ~= nil then fateTable[cardName].count = 0 end end
function StopCapture(name, line, wildcards) persist_save() EnableTriggerGroup("fate_capture", false) end
function CapFirst(str) return (str:gsub("^%l", string.upper)) end
function pairsByKeys(t, f) local a = {} for n in pairs(t) do table.insert(a, n) end table.sort(a, f) local i = 0 -- iterator variable local iter = function () -- iterator function i = i + 1 if a[i] == nil then return nil else return a[i], t[a[i]] end end return iter end
function FantasyCards_Init() OnPluginInstall() end
function FantasyCards_Alias_Help(matches) Help() end function FantasyCards_Alias_Summary(matches) Summary(nil,nil,{case=matches[2]}) end function FantasyCards_Alias_Find(matches) FindCard(nil,nil,{[2]=matches[3]}) end function FantasyCards_Alias_Report(matches) ReportCards(nil,nil,{case=matches[2],channel=matches[3]}) end function FantasyCards_Alias_Owned(matches) ReportOwnedCards(nil,nil,{case=matches[2],channel=matches[3]}) end function FantasyCards_Alias_Scan(matches) ScanCases() end
function FantasyCards_TR_Start(matches) StartCapture(nil,nil,{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Capture(matches) Capture(nil,nil,{card=matches[2]}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Retrieve(matches) RetrieveCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[2]}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Stop(matches) StopCapture(nil,nil,{total=matches[2]}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Market(matches) MarketCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[3]},{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Auction(matches) AuctionCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[3]},{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_Bid(matches) BidCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[3]},{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_LBid(matches) LBidCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[3]},{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_MarketList(matches) MarketListCard(nil,nil,{card=matches[2]},{}) end function FantasyCards_TR_ScanDone(matches) ScanComplete() end
FantasyCards_Init()
